summary: Completed frontend testing of baseball tracker features. All 8 requested features verified working: Home navigation to /dashboard, StatMoose logo to /, baseball field image, starter config dialog with 4 steps, 9 dropdowns per step, teams page refresh button, and team creation.
seed_data_creation: Created test team: TEST_New Baseball Team (ID: 941db06e-fe8e-4be6-82d7-09c3ce2bfcfd)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All baseball features working correctly. Demo mode at /demo/baseball uses MOCKED API at /api/demo/baseball. Starter config dialog has 4 steps: home batting, home defense, away batting, away defense. Each step has 9 dropdowns for player selection.

home_navigation_to_dashboard.notes: Home button in Layout.jsx (line 87) correctly links to /dashboard via <Link to='/dashboard'>

statmoose_logo_to_homepage.notes: StatMoose logo in header (line 62) correctly links to / via <Link to='/'>

starter_config_dialog_appears.notes: StarterConfigDialog appears automatically when starting a new baseball game with teams that have rosters

starter_dialog_4_steps.notes: Dialog has 4 steps: Step 1 (home batting), Step 2 (home defense), Step 3 (away batting), Step 4 (away defense). Progress bar shows step progression.

starter_dialog_9_dropdowns.notes: Each step shows 9 dropdowns for player selection. Batting order has numbered positions 1-9, defense has position labels (P, C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, LF, CF, RF)

teams_page_refresh_button.notes: Refresh button found with data-testid='refresh-teams-btn'. Clicking it reloads the teams list.

team_creation_works.notes: Create Team dialog opens, accepts team name/color/logo, creates team successfully and navigates to team detail page

mocked_api_note: Demo mode uses /api/demo/baseball for mock data. Regular game mode uses real backend APIs.
